key_quote: 3M Co. is exploring the potential sale of billions of dollars worth of assets from its industrial operations as part of a strategy to divest low-growth businesses. The conglomerate has engaged Goldman Sachs Group Inc. to help review possible divestments in October 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Goldman Sachs mandated as financial adviser. Safety and industrials unit generated ~$11B revenue. Includes aftermarket auto products, personal safety equipment, industrial adhesives and tapes. CEO Bill Brown stated ~1/3 of sales in commodity-like areas.
notes: Announced Oct 2025. No final decision made. Could opt to keep current structure. Part of broader portfolio simplification after Solventum spinoff.

division: Productivity Solutions & Services (PSS) and Warehouse & Workflow Solutions (WWS)
key_quote: In July 2025, Honeywell announced plans to evaluate strategic alternatives for its Productivity Solutions and Services (PSS) and Warehouse and Workflow Solutions (WWS) businesses, which generate $2 billion in revenue. Honeywell has retained Centerview Partners as the company's financial adviser.
buyer_intelligence: Centerview Partners mandated as financial adviser. Part of transformation to pure-play automation business. Portfolio evaluation initiated early 2024.
notes: Announced July 2025. Part of $14B M&A activity since June 2023. Already sold PPE business to Protective Industrial Products in May 2025.

key_quote: Gerresheimer AG is reportedly exploring a potential sale of its entire business, with private equity firms including Warburg Pincus, EQT AB, and KKR expressing interest in 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Three major PE firms (Warburg Pincus, EQT, KKR) showing interest. Whole company sale being explored.
notes: German pharmaceutical packaging and medical device manufacturer. Whole company review, not division carve-out.

key_quote: PagerDuty is exploring options, including a potential sale, after receiving inbound acquisition interest and is working with Qatalyst Partners on the sale effort, after attracting interest from both financial sponsors and strategic acquirers.
buyer_intelligence: Qatalyst Partners running process. Receiving interest from both PE (financial sponsors) and strategic buyers. Inbound interest received.
notes: Software/SaaS company exploring sale. Both PE and strategic interest reported.

key_quote: Forward Air Corp. has reportedly received bids from multiple private equity firms in July 2025, with five investment firms placing bids: Clearlake Capital, Platinum Equity, EQT, Apollo Global Management and American Industrial Partners.
buyer_intelligence: Five PE firms submitted bids in July 2025. Strategic review launched January 2025 after failed Omni Logistics acquisition. Activist investor Ancora Holdings (4% stake) pushed for sale. Current market cap $855M, enterprise value ~$3B with debt.
notes: LTL trucking and logistics. Competitive auction with 5 PE bidders. Whole company sale, not carve-out. Each bidder could be counted as separate PE Bid Submitted signal.

key_quote: Several private equity giants including Bain Capital, Advent International, EQT, and even KKR were considering bids for Trend Micro, as reported in February 2025.
buyer_intelligence: Four major PE firms (Bain, Advent, EQT, KKR) considering bids. Reported February 2025. Cybersecurity company.
notes: Japanese cybersecurity company. Will be excluded due to Asia geography filter for completed/definitive deals, but valid as PE Bid signal.
